description: Create a visual Argument Map diagram for the 'AI Pause' policy debate in ~/Diagrams/ai_argument_map.drawio based on the arguments provided in ~/Desktop/debate_structure.txt. The diagram must feature the central claim "Immediate 6-Month Pause on Giant AI Experiments" with 3 supporting arguments positioned on the left and 3 opposing arguments on the right. Use green (#00CC00) solid arrows for supporting connections and red (#FF0000) dashed arrows for opposing connections and the 2 required rebuttals. Export the completed diagram as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/ai_argument_map.pdf.
